industries.title: Industry-Specific Solutions
industries.description: We deliver tailored solutions built on deep understanding of each industry's regulatory environment, business processes, and technical requirements.

finance.desc: Real-time trading systems, risk management, and regulatory compliance platforms

manufacturing.desc: Smart factory solutions, supply chain optimization, and predictive maintenance systems

aiData.title: AI & Data Intelligence
aiData.desc: From ML model development and MLOps pipeline construction to LLM fine-tuning and data lake design, we build data-driven decision-making frameworks.

webPlatform.title: Enterprise Web Platform
webPlatform.desc: We architect and develop scalable web platforms and back-office systems built on microservices, designed to handle massive concurrent traffic.

cloudInfra.title: Cloud & Infrastructure
cloudInfra.desc: We handle legacy cloud migrations, container orchestration, IaC-based infrastructure automation, and security architecture implementation.

customSolution.title: Custom Solution Development
customSolution.desc: We develop bespoke solutions optimized for your business needs, including e-commerce, CMS, ERP integrations, and mobile applications.

domain.title: Industry Domain Expertise
domain.desc: We deliver practical solutions grounded in deep understanding of regulatory environments and business processes across finance, manufacturing, retail, and the public sector.

endToEnd.title: End-to-End Technical Capability
endToEnd.desc: From requirements analysis through design, development, testing, deployment, and operations — our in-house team ensures consistent quality and accountability at every stage.

partnership.title: Long-Term Technology Partnership
partnership.desc: We go beyond one-off projects, contributing to our clients' competitive advantage through continuous system enhancement and ongoing technical support.

hero.title: Our Work
hero.description: Explore our diverse portfolio of completed projects and see HANBIT's technical expertise in action.

aiRecommendation.title: AI Recommendation System
aiRecommendation.description: Built an ML-powered personalized product recommendation system that increased purchase conversion by 35%.
aiRecommendation.detailedDescription: We built a real-time personalization recommendation system for a large-scale e-commerce platform. By implementing a hybrid recommendation algorithm combining collaborative and content-based filtering, we significantly improved recommendation accuracy.

fintechDashboard.title: Fintech Dashboard
fintechDashboard.description: Developed a web application for real-time financial data visualization and transaction management.
fintechDashboard.detailedDescription: We built a comprehensive dashboard system for a financial startup. It collects and visualizes real-time stock, cryptocurrency, and forex data, enabling users to intuitively manage their investment portfolios.

cloudMigration.title: Cloud Migration
cloudMigration.description: Migrated a legacy system to AWS cloud, reducing operational costs by 40%.
cloudMigration.detailedDescription: We transformed a 20-year-old legacy system into a modern cloud architecture. Through microservices adoption, containerization, and CI/CD pipeline implementation, we dramatically improved scalability and maintainability.

mobileCommerce.title: Mobile Commerce App
mobileCommerce.description: Developed a cross-platform mobile shopping app with React Native, increasing mobile revenue by 60%.
mobileCommerce.detailedDescription: We developed a premium mobile shopping experience for a fashion brand. Differentiated user experiences were achieved through AR-powered virtual fitting and personalized styling recommendations.

dataAnalytics.title: Data Analytics Platform
dataAnalytics.description: Built an integrated platform for big data collection, processing, and analysis.
dataAnalytics.detailedDescription: We built a data platform that enables real-time analysis and optimization of marketing campaign effectiveness. It collects data from diverse sources and delivers insights through real-time processing.

llmChatbot.title: Enterprise LLM Chatbot
llmChatbot.description: Built an intelligent internal chatbot system powered by conversational AI.
llmChatbot.detailedDescription: We developed an intelligent chatbot that instantly answers employees' work-related questions 24/7. It delivers accurate information by combining RAG-based retrieval with the company's internal knowledge base.

02.title: Requirements Analysis

tips.title: Consultation Tips
items: Preparing specific requirements in advance helps us provide a more accurate consultation
If you have existing systems, please have relevant documentation ready
Share your approximate budget and timeline expectations

duration.q: How long does a typical project take?
duration.a: Web development projects typically take 2-4 months, while AI projects take 3-6 months.

maintenance.a: We offer 3 months of complimentary support, followed by optional monthly maintenance contracts.

sourceCode.a: Full source code ownership transfers to the client upon final payment.

remote.q: Do you work with remote teams?
remote.a: Yes, we collaborate effectively through regular video calls and collaboration tools.
